## Meeting Purpose

[Review and discuss new branding proposals for Check That, focusing on logo design and visual identity.](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two main logo concepts presented: a radar-inspired "C" design and an abstract circular form](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [The radar concept was well-received, offering versatility and unique branding opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Color palette options explored, with green as the primary color and potential for easy customization](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Website mockups demonstrated how the new branding could be implemented, including animated elements](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

## Topics

### Radar Logo Concept

  - [Primary design features a "C" shape resembling a radar symbol](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Unique and recognizable, not found in competitor logos](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Combines well with sans-serif font, suggesting tech without being too rigid](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Versatile for various applications and scales](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Visual Identity Elements

  - [Color palette: Primary green with supporting grays](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Additional functional colors (red, yellow) for variety](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Potential for abstract visual elements derived from the radar concept](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Stackable search-like fields and layered visuals to represent AI functionality](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Website Design Proposals

  - [Simplified, chat-GPT inspired layout](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Radar visual incorporated into header design](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Animated elements suggested (e.g., rotating radar, pulsing circles)](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Flat visuals preferred over 3D for clarity and text readability](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Alternative Abstract Logo

  - [Simplified circular form offering more abstraction](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Potential interpretations: bullseye, search icon, or general target](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Provides flexibility for brand expansion and various applications](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Color Variations

  - [Demonstrated how changing the primary color (e.g., to blue) affects overall brand feel](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Offers easy customization options for different use cases or team preferences](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to review and share the concepts with the team](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Giel to refine the SVG file of the chosen logo for developers](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Team to implement the new branding in the coming week, with potential for immediate use](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Renato to provide feedback after initial implementation](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Continued iteration and polish based on implementation feedback](https://fathom.video/share/LFAhvM_R9RydL4jG46ruxgetPkLViRnR?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
